title: Diamold
description: Adds weapons, tools and armor with gold's efficiency, diamond's durability and pretty nice look.
body: ## List of items: * Diamold Ingot * Diamold Block * Diamold Sword * Diamold Pickaxe * Diamold Axe * Diamold Shovel * Diamold Hoe * Diamold Helmet * Diamold Chestplate * Diamold Leggings * Diamold Boots ![Image of items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/xVemu/diamold/master/2020-10-24_17.02.27.png)
